style_presets.flat-gradient: flat vector illustration, soft gradient fill, clean lines, corporate but friendly
style_presets.line-mono: monochrome line illustration, thin consistent strokes, geometric primitives, minimal fills
style_presets.iso-geometric: isometric geometric illustration, soft long shadows, single accent color
style_presets.abstract-geometric: abstract geometric composition, layered color blocks, subtle grain
style_presets.paper-cut: paper-cut illustration, layered construction, soft drop shadows between layers

prompt.common_prefix: flat vector illustration, soft gradient fill, clean lines, corporate but friendly, transparent background
prompt.text_space_right: left 60% empty negative space for text block
prompt.text_space_left: right 60% empty negative space for text block
prompt.per_section_metaphor_hint: single focal metaphor, no text, no charts, no numbers

negative_prompt: text, typography, letters, charts with numbers, cluttered, dark mood, photorealistic, photo of people, watermark, logo text
